docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ORINOCO AS TO DEFENDANT L`ACCESSORIE/ RAQUEL DOMINGUEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-02-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
